doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document fabricates a nonexistent EDPB guidance note with invented case references, a false superseded document, and a legal position contradicting established GDPR jurisprudence on pseudonymized data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists; the document contains multiple fabricated elements including a nonexistent CJEU case citation format for "IAB Europe (C-604/22)" used out of context, a falsely cited superseded document ("EDPB Guidance 05/2014"), and a legal position contradicting established GDPR jurisprudence (Breyer case) that pseudonymized data remains personal data even when a processor lacks the key, suggesting this is an AI-generated document rather than authentic EDPB output.
